name: Lunar New Year 2pk 12.58 fl oz Highball Glassware Tumbler Set Red Floral
description: Elevate your New Year celebrations with this Lunar New Year 2-Pack 12.58-Fluid-Ounce Highball Glassware Tumbler Set. This two-pack set features a pair of highball tumblers adorned with a red floral pattern to bring festive charm to your table. Made of glass, these tumblers are intended for serving cold beverages only. The microwave-safe design offers convenient reheating, and they should be hand washed to clean.
